title: Crystal Caves 2
description:
Crystal Caves 2.0 adds a new line of crystal tools, armor, and blocks to Minecraft.

body:
Crystal Caves 2.0 — New Crystal Items

Curseforge: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/crystal-caves-2

Crystal Caves 2.0 adds a new line of crystal tools, armor, and blocks to Minecraft.
This is an early version of the mod, and more blocks will be added in the future.

All items are crafted and fit perfectly into vanilla balance — between iron and diamond.

🔮 What the mod adds:
Resource:

Crystal Shard — crafted from diamond, amethyst, and iron ingot (4 pieces)

Tools:

Crystal Sword (6.5 damage)

Crystal Pickaxe

Crystal Axe

Crystal Shovel

Armor:

Crystal Helmet

Crystal Chestplate

Crystal Leggings

Crystal Boots

📦 Dependencies
Minecraft 1.21.1

Fabric Loader

Fabric API

🧪 How to play with the mod
Mine diamond, amethyst, and iron

Craft crystal shards

Create tools, armor, and blocks

Explore the world with new possibilities!
